/Users/eositis/opt/arm-gnu-toolchain-14.2.rel1-darwin-x86_64-arm-none-eabi/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=cortex-m0plus -mthumb -g -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--build-id=none -Wl,--wrap=weak_raw_vprintf -Wl,--wrap=panic --specs=nosys.specs -nostartfiles -Wl,--script=/Users/eositis/pico-sdk/src/rp2040/boot_stage2/boot_stage2.ld -Wl,-Map=/Users/eositis/Documents/GitHub/A2C_DVI_Firmware/_BUILD/pico-sdk/src/rp2040/boot_stage2/bs2_default.elf.map CMakeFiles/bs2_default.dir/compile_time_choice.S.o -o bs2_default.elf
